title: Shamkhani: Iran ready to sign nuclear deal if all sanctions lifted — 'He speaks of olive branch but we see only barbed wire'
snippet: Khamenei advisor Ali Shamkhani responded to Trump's 20-year moratorium offer saying Iran is ready to sign in exchange for quick removal of all financial sanctions. Criticized Trump's rhetoric: 'He speaks of an olive branch, but we see only barbed wire.' Absence of sanctions relief renders US plan unacceptable. Core disagreement: nuclear concessions vs sanctions relief.
tag_reason: 샴카니의 트럼프 핵 제안에 대한 공식 대응은 5/16 최초 보도. 이전 소스에 샴카니 발언 없음.
